title: Tralus and Talus Liberation Party
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Tralus|more=Talus|more2=Liberation}} {{Organization |image=[[File:TTLP.jpg]] |name=Tralus and Talus Liberation Party |type=*Separatist movement''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' *Terrorist organization{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Haleen Snowline|Talus}} |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters=*[[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] *[[Talus/Legends|Talus]] |locations=[[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|What is the Talus and Tralus Liberation Party?"
"They're a fringe group that espouses secession from the 'Five Brothers' group of planets in the Corellia System.|A spacer and [[Haleen Snowline]]|}} The '''Tralus and Talus Liberation Party''', colloquially referred to as the '''TraTaLibbers''', or the '''TTLP''', was a political movement active in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]]. They advocated that the [[Double Worlds]] [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] and [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] separate from the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Diktat|government]] and rule themselves independently. ==History== {{Quote|Terrorists from the fringe Talus and Tralus Liberation Party have stolen valuable state secrets. I urge you to retrieve these secrets and resolve this situation regarding these insurgents.|Haleen Snowline, to a spacer|}} During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Tralus and Talus Liberation Party was in conflict with Corellian local authorities, namely the [[Corellian Security Force]] and the [[Federation of the Double Worlds]], as well as with the [[Aa'kuan]] anarchists on Talus.{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}} Another similar movement was the [[Two Worlders]]. [[File:TTLP_soldiers_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[TTLP soldiers]].]] After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Talus and Tralus Liberation Party acquired evidence that the [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] of Talus [[Hagrin Zeed]] was involved in various criminal activities. They first blackmailed the politician but then considered to publicly reveal Zeed's wrongdoings. The Talusian government therefore designated the TTLP as a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] organization. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} the Talusian [[Minister of Protocol]] [[Haleen Snowline]] hired a spacer to murder TTLP members and retrieve the incriminating evidence. The same year, the Liberation Party wanted to create an alliance with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The TTLP shipped weapons, medical equipment and valuable artifacts to a Rebel [[Weapons Depot|weapons depot]] on Talus in order to obtain Alliance support. Around the same time, [[TTLP soldiers]] were involved in the robbing of [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] graves on Talus. They were eventually stopped when the the Aqualish [[Omkoo]] hired a spacer who fought several TTLP soldiers at an ancient [[Aqualish gravesite]] and retrieved all stolen Aqualish artifacts.{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|Grave Robbers|Talus}} The Tralus and Talus Liberation Party was still active in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], during the [[Corellian Crisis|Starbuster Plot]], but the TraTaLibbers were not involved in the conflict. ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided Quick Reference Guide]]'' *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Faction#Liberation Party|Faction}} [[Category:Organizations of the Corellian system]] [[Category:Political factions]] [[Category:Terrorist groups]]
